summary: Website for a Coimbatore-based steam ironing, laundry, and dry cleaning business with a classic, competitor-aligned design using free stock images.
architectural_notes: Use only free-to-use stock images depicting steam ironing, laundry/dry cleaning, saree pleating/ironing, stain removal; keep overall look classic/professional and competitor-aligned.
Homepage header/top area must display the business name “MJ Steam Ironing and Dry Cleaning Services” and the tagline “The one-stop shop for all your daily clean needs.”
User requested a site-wide light-blue theme with dark text (override any previous non-blue palette preference).
Use free-to-use stock images that include washing machines and convey dry cleaning/laundry services.
Brand text styling: display business name in ALL CAPS, bold, with a block-style 3D text effect.
known_issues: Previous attempt to generate/implement the website design failed with an 'unable to implement' error; user requested retry.
Phone number currently displayed on the site was reported incorrect; must be updated to 98431 29760 everywhere it appears.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Block-style 3D text reading "MJ STEAM IRONING AND DRY CLEANING SERVICES" on a transparent background (brand-3d-block.dim_1600x400.png)
- Photo of modern front-loading washing machines in a clean laundry/dry-cleaning setting (gallery-washing-machine-1.dim_1200x800.jpg)
- Photo of a professional laundry/dry-cleaning workspace including washing machines and garment racks (gallery-washing-machine-2.dim_1200x800.jpg)

existing_features.title: Create a responsive single-page marketing website homepage for a Coimbatore (Tamil Nadu, India) steam ironing, laundry, and dry cleaning business, using a classic, professional layout aligned with common competitor sites.
Implement a coherent classic visual theme (colors, typography, spacing, component styling) and apply it consistently across the site. Do not use a blue/purple primary palette.
Add a Hero section with a strong headline, short supporting text, and clear calls-to-action for contacting the business (Call and WhatsApp).
Create a Services section with cards for these services: Steam Ironing, Dry Cleaning, Stain Removal, Darning, Saree Pleating & Ironing. Each card must include a short description.

Add a 'Why Choose Us' section with 4–6 classic, trust-building highlights relevant to local customers (e.g., fabric-safe process, on-time delivery, affordable pricing, experienced handling of sarees).

Add a 'How It Works' section describing the process in 3–4 steps (e.g., Drop-off/Call, Cleaning & Care, Steam Pressing/Finishing, Pickup/Delivery). Keep wording non-committal about pickup/delivery (do not promise unless explicitly configured).
Add a Testimonials section with 3 placeholder customer reviews (text-only), written in a realistic, professional tone. Do not attribute to real people unless the user provides names.
Add a Gallery section that displays a grid of free stock images depicting steam ironing, laundry care, dry cleaning, and neatly pressed sarees/fabrics.

Add a Contact section with business details and simple contact actions (Call, WhatsApp). Include fields/placeholders for Address in Coimbatore, Business Hours, and a short note about services. Do not embed interactive maps.
Add basic on-page SEO elements: page title, meta description, and sensible heading hierarchy (one H1, then H2s per section).
Render all generated images as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them directly from the frontend (do not route images through the backend).

Update the top header brand text in `frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx` to display the company name and tagline exactly as: “MJ Steam Ironing and Dry Cleaning Services - The one-stop shop for all your daily clean needs.”
Update the footer brand text in `frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx` to use the same company name and tagline so branding is consistent across the site.

Apply a clean light-blue visual theme (light-blue backgrounds with dark/near-black text) consistently across the entire site by updating the global theme tokens in `frontend/src/index.css` (e.g., `--background`, `--muted`, `--card`, `--primary`, `--accent`, `--border`, and related foreground tokens), ensuring all sections and components (including header/footer, cards, and muted section backgrounds like Gallery) reflect the light-blue styling.

Update the displayed phone number site-wide to `98431 29760` by changing `businessInfo.phone` in `frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts`, and ensure every call action uses the updated number (e.g., Hero and Contact 'Call Now' buttons and the Contact 'Phone' link).

Update the WhatsApp number site-wide so that WhatsApp links use the correct `wa.me` format for the phone number `98431 29760` by updating `businessInfo.whatsapp` in `frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts` to the E.164 digits-only format expected by `https://wa.me/<number>` (India country code included).

Add additional free-to-use stock gallery images that clearly include washing machines and visually reflect laundry/dry cleaning services, and include them in `galleryImages` in `frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts` so they render in the Gallery grid.

Change the brand/business name display to ALL CAPS, bold, with a block-style 3D look by generating a block-style 3D text graphic for the brand name and updating `frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx` and `frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx` to use the new block-style 3D branding presentation (while keeping the existing tagline text present and readable).

new_feature_requests.summary: Design a classic, professional website for a steam ironing/laundry/dry cleaning business (services: steam ironing, dry cleaning, stain removal, darning, saree pleating & ironing) aligned with competitor layouts, using free stock images.
Add company name and tagline at the top of the homepage/header: “MJ Steam Ironing and Dry Cleaning Services - The one-stop shop for all your daily clean needs.”
Apply a clean light-blue theme (light-blue backgrounds with dark/near-black text) consistently across all sections of the site.
Add free-to-use stock images that include washing machines and reflect dry cleaning/laundry services (for gallery/visual sections).
Update the displayed phone number site-wide (including Contact section and Call/WhatsApp actions) to: 98431 29760.
Change the brand/business name display to ALL CAPS, bold, with a block-style 3D text effect.

projectName: Classic single-page website for Coimbatore steam ironing & dry cleaning business (with free stock imagery)
